risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly/disassembly sequences and use alignment tools

risk.desc: Risk of dimensional inaccuracies due to manufacturing tolerances
risk.mit: Implement strict quality control measures and use high-precision manufacturing processes

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for field maintenance
risk.mit: Ensure all critical components have removable trays or access panels
